nl_query: List all faculty members who prepared the answer key for the Algorithms exam and whether they are also in the evaluator pool for that course.
failed_sql: SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, ep.is_available AS is_in_evaluator_pool FROM evaluator_pool ep JOIN board b ON b.id = ep.board_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = ep.faculty_cache_id JOIN answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id WHERE ak.qp_id = (SELECT id FROM question_paper WHERE title ILIKE '%Algorithms%') AND ak.status = 'APPROVED' AND ep.is_available = TRUE ORDER BY fc.name
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (faculty_cache, question_paper, board, answer_key, evaluator_pool). You must qualify it with a table alias.
